subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Jan. 1909
subcodes.first_line: Verily, in this Cause, the sword is the divine breezes of God; the physical sword took life, whereas this one bestows life eternal [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بلی در این امر شمشیر نفحات الهیه است آن شمشیر میکشت این جان می دهد
subcodes.subjects: @holy war [jihad]; violence in the name of God, @House of Justice, @contention and conflict, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @growth of the Cause
